faq.q: What is the best time to visit Alavaimalai Subrayar Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Alavaimalai Subrayar Murugan Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Alavaimalai Subrayar Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (102 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Alavaimalai Subrayar Murugan Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Alavaimalai Subrayar Murugan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Alavaimalai Subrayar Murugan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Alavaimalai Subrayar Murugan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Alavaimalai Subrayar Murugan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Alavaimalai, O Sowthapuram, Naduppatty, Alavaipatti, Athanur.
